sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39451" key="e)piqh/rarxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιθήραρχ-ος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n39451.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">officer commanding such a contingent</tr_>, ll.cc.</sense> </entryFree>
